# Generated Tooling Ownership

This repo uses generated files from PandaCSS, TanStack Start/Router, Vite/Nitro, and Turborepo. The ownership rules are:

## Tracked Generated Files

- `apps/web/src/routeTree.gen.ts` is tracked because TanStack Router type registration is part of app source compilation.
- Do not edit `routeTree.gen.ts` by hand; TanStack Router overwrites it.
- Biome excludes `routeTree.gen.ts` so formatting/linting does not churn generated code.

## Ignored Generated Directories

- `styled-system/` is generated by PandaCSS in `@ai-usage/design-system` and `@ai-usage/web`.
- `apps/web/dist/` is generated by Vite build.
- `apps/web/.output/` is generated by Nitro/TanStack Start build.
- `.turbo/` is Turborepo cache state.

These directories are ignored by git and Biome.

## Turbo Outputs

- `@ai-usage/design-system#build` and `@ai-usage/design-system#check` cache `styled-system/**`.
- `@ai-usage/web#build` caches `dist/**`, `.output/**`, and `styled-system/**`.
- `@ai-usage/web#check` caches `styled-system/**` from Panda codegen/cssgen.

## Direct Package Scripts

`apps/web` scripts still run `bun --filter @ai-usage/design-system build` before Panda commands. This is intentional because developers and tests run package scripts directly, outside `turbo run`, and the report Panda scan imports the design-system build info export.
